business_question: Which products have shown declining sales for three consecutive months?
business_context: Category managers need to identify products requiring promotional support or assortment review.
sql_answer:
WITH monthly_sales AS (
SELECT
p.PRODUCT_NAME,
d.YEAR,
d.MONTH,
SUM(s.NET_UNITS_SOLD) AS SALES
FROM FACT_SALES s
JOIN DIM_PRODUCT p
ON s.PRODUCT_KEY = p.PRODUCT_KEY
JOIN DIM_DATE d
ON s.DATE_KEY = d.DATE_KEY
GROUP BY p.PRODUCT_NAME, d.YEAR, d.MONTH
)
SELECT *
FROM monthly_sales;
